title.en: Scotland primed for game of their lives against fallible Brazil
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰准备好与易犯错的巴西进行人生博弈

summary.en: Scotland don't know what they need against Brazil to reach the World Cup knockout phase, but will know they need to improve on the previous two games, writes Tom English.
summary.zh-CN: Tom English写道，苏格兰不知道他们需要对阵巴西才能进入世界杯淘汰赛阶段，但他们知道自己需要在前两场比赛中取得进步。

title.en: England's James and Rice to have fitness assessed
title.zh-CN: 英格兰的詹姆斯和赖斯进行健身评估

summary.en: England will assess the fitness of Reece James and Declan Rice before their final World Cup group game against Panama.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队将在与巴拿马队的最后一场世界杯小组赛之前评估里斯·詹姆斯和德克兰·赖斯的健康状况。

title.en: Tuchel's England are opposite to Southgate's - and built to beat top teams
title.zh-CN: Tuchel的英格兰队与Southgate的英格兰队相反-旨在击败顶级球队

summary.en: BBC Sport's football tactics writer Umir Irfan explains why Thomas Tuchel's England system is built to prosper against the world's top nations.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道的足球战术作家乌米尔·伊尔凡（ Umir Irfan ）解释了为什么托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的英格兰体系是为了对抗世界顶级国家

title.en: As Messi turns 39, how he and Ronaldo keep breaking records
title.zh-CN: 随着梅西年满39岁，他和罗纳尔多如何不断打破纪录

summary.en: Lionel Messi, 39, and Cristiano Ronaldo, 41, keep delivering on the world's biggest stage.
summary.zh-CN: 39岁的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）和41岁的克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）继续在世界上最大

title.en: Why Bellingham was not sent off for covering his mouth
title.zh-CN: 为什么Bellingham没有因为捂住嘴而被解雇

summary.en: England midfielder Jude Bellingham was not shown a red card despite covering his mouth while talking to Ghana's Jordan Ayew.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰中场球员裘德·贝林厄姆在与加纳的乔丹·阿尤交谈时捂住嘴，但没有出示红牌。

title.en: England to face Scotland? World Cup knockout stage as it stands
title.zh-CN: 英格兰要面对苏格兰？世界杯淘汰赛现状

summary.en: Use BBC Sport's projections tool with in-game updates to plot your country's route through the World Cup knockouts.
summary.zh-CN: 使用BBC Sport的预测工具和游戏内更新来绘制您所在国家通过世界杯淘汰赛的路线。

title.en: Colombia qualify for last 32 with win over DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚有资格获得最后32场比赛，击败刚果民主共和国

summary.en: Daniel Munoz's deflected strike is enough for Colombia to beat DR Congo and secure their place in the 2026 World Cup knockout stage.
summary.zh-CN: 丹尼尔·穆尼奥斯（ Daniel Munoz ）的偏转罢工足以让哥伦比亚击败刚果民主共和国，并在2026年世界杯淘汰赛阶段占据一席之地。

title.en: Croatia earn narrow win to knock out Panama
title.zh-CN: 克罗地亚以微弱优势击败巴拿马

summary.en: Croatia remain in contention for a last-32 spot at the World Cup after earning their first points in Group L with a win over Panama, who are knocked out of the World Cup following the loss.
summary.zh-CN: 克罗地亚队在L组赢得第一个积分后，仍然争夺世界杯的最后32分，击败了巴拿马队，巴拿马队在输球后被淘汰出世界杯。

title.en: No need to panic for England - but this was a reality check
title.zh-CN: 没有必要为英格兰而恐慌-但这是一个现实检查

summary.en: England's drab goalless draw with Ghana is no cause to panic - but it does serve as a reality check, writes Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）写道，英格兰队与加纳队单调乏味的无球平局并不令人恐慌，但它确实可以作为现实检查。

title.en: What are Scotland's chances of progressing as third-place finishers?
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰作为第三名选手晋级的机会有多大？

summary.en: With 32 of 48 teams advancing to the knockout rounds of the World Cup it is more difficult to be eliminated than to qualify.
summary.zh-CN: 随着48支球队中有32支晋级世界杯淘汰赛，被淘汰比晋级更困难。

title.en: Silly tackle, bad reaction - Tuchel defends Bellingham after Queiroz row
title.zh-CN: 愚蠢的铲球，不良反应- Tuchel在Queiroz排后为Bellingham辩护

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel defends Jude Bellingham after the midfielder is involved in a heated row with Ghana boss Carlos Queiroz.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）在与加纳老板卡洛斯·奎罗斯（ Carlos Queiroz ）进行激烈争吵后，为裘德·贝灵汉
